subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come in the shadows of the clouds is verily the Source of His Revelation and the Dayspring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی فی ظلل الغمام انه لمطلع وحیه و مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
